title: RHCSA 10 Mock Exam B
description: Software and permissions focus: offline package installation, shared directories, default ACLs, fixed user identity, storage, NFS, journald, and systemd administration.

tasks: On client, recover root access and configure the client hostname. Set the root password to cinder9. Then set hostname to clientb.exam10.lab and map serverb.exam10.lab to 192.168.122.3.
On client, configure System eth1 with IPv4 address 192.168.122.61/24, gateway 192.168.122.1, and DNS 192.168.122.3.
On client and server, create enabled BaseOS and AppStream repository definitions with BaseOS at http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and AppStream at http://server/repo/AppStream/; disable GPG checks.
On client, install the tree package from the configured offline repositories.
On client, create /srv/teamb10 as a shared directory for group teamb10.
On client, create group teamb10, create user userb10, set password cinder9, and add the user to teamb10.
On client, create user auditorb10 with UID 6102 and shell /sbin/nologin.
On client, set maximum password age for userb10 to 46 days and warning period to 7 days.
On client, create /usr/local/bin/b-who that prints the primary group for the supplied user argument.
On client, create /root/exam-b-report.txt containing REPORT-B and copy it to server:/root/exam-b-report.txt.
On client, create gzip archive /root/b-etc.tar.gz containing /etc/hosts and /etc/fstab.
On client, create /root/b-original, hard link /root/b-hard, and symlink /root/b-soft.
On server, create and enable serverbtimer.timer so it appends SERVER-B to /var/log/serverbtimer.log every 10 minutes.
On client, create VG vgb10 and LV datab mounted at /mnt/datab10.
On server, publish /var/www/html/server-b.html containing RHCSA10-B and serve httpd on TCP port 8201.
On server, create group serverb10 and user srvb10 with password cinder9, then add the user to serverb10.
On server, allow members of serverb10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
On server, enable persistent systemd journal storage.
On server, route local5 log messages to /var/log/server-b-local5.log and write a test message.
On server, export /exports/exam-b to the 192.168.122.0/24 network. On client, mount server:/exports/exam-b persistently at /mnt/bprojects.
On server, set the default boot target to multi-user.target without rebooting.
On client, install lsof and ensure tcpdump is removed.
hints: Make changes persistent unless a question says otherwise.
Use local repositories and local documentation; do not depend on internet access.
Flatpak and systemd timer tasks belong to the RHCSA 10 track.
checks: echo cinder9 | su - root -c whoami 2>/dev/null | grep -qx root && hostnamectl --static | grep -qx clientb.exam10.lab && grep -Eq '^192\.168\.122\.3[[:space:]]+serverb\.exam10\.lab$' /etc/hosts

connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.61/24' && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.1' && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.3' && nmcli -g ipv4.method connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx manual

awk 'function flush(){if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/BaseOS\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") base=1;if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/AppStream\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") app=1}function value(){sub(/^[^=]*=/, ""); gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, ""); return $0}/^[[:space:]]*\[/ {flush(); baseurl=enabled=gpgcheck=""; next}/^[[:space:]]*baseurl[[:space:]]*=/ {baseurl=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*enabled[[:space:]]*=/ {enabled=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*gpgcheck[[:space:]]*=/ {gpgcheck=value(); next}END{flush(); exit !(base && app)}' /etc/yum.repos.d/*.repo && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; awk '"'"'function flush(){if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/BaseOS\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") base=1;if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/AppStream\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") app=1}function value(){sub(/^[^=]*=/, ""); gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, ""); return $0}/^[[:space:]]*\[/ {flush(); baseurl=enabled=gpgcheck=""; next}/^[[:space:]]*baseurl[[:space:]]*=/ {baseurl=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*enabled[[:space:]]*=/ {enabled=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*gpgcheck[[:space:]]*=/ {gpgcheck=value(); next}END{flush(); exit !(base && app)}'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/*.repo'
command -v tree >/dev/null && rpm -q tree >/dev/null
getent group teamb10 >/dev/null && stat -c '%U:%G:%a' /srv/teamb10 | grep -qx root:teamb10:3770
getent group teamb10 >/dev/null && id -nG userb10 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx teamb10
id -u auditorb10 | grep -qx 6102 && getent passwd auditorb10 | awk -F: '$7 == "/sbin/nologin" {found=1} END {exit !found}'
chage -l userb10 | grep -Eq 'Maximum.*46'
test -x /usr/local/bin/b-who && /usr/local/bin/b-who root | grep -qx root
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq REPORT-B /root/exam-b-report.txt'
test -f /root/b-etc.tar.gz && tar -tzf /root/b-etc.tar.gz | grep -Eq 'etc/(hosts|fstab)'
test "$(stat -c %i /root/b-original)" = "$(stat -c %i /root/b-hard)" && test -L /root/b-soft

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl is-enabled serverbtimer.timer | grep -qx enabled && grep -Eq '"'"'^OnCalendar=\*:0/10$'"'"' /etc/systemd/system/serverbtimer.timer && grep -Fxq '"'"'echo SERVER-B >> /var/log/serverbtimer.log'"'"' /usr/local/sbin/serverbtimer.sh'

lv_path=/dev/vgb10/datab; mapper_path=/dev/mapper/vgb10-datab; mountpoint=/mnt/datab10; lv_uuid="$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$lv_path")"; lvs "$lv_path" >/dev/null 2>&1 && findmnt -no TARGET "$mountpoint" | grep -qx "$mountpoint" && awk -v dev="$lv_path" -v mapper="$mapper_path" -v uuid="$lv_uuid" -v target="$mountpoint" '$1 !~ /^#/ && $2 == target && $3 == "xfs" && ($1 == dev || $1 == mapper || $1 == "UUID=" uuid || $1 == "/dev/disk/by-uuid/" uuid) {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq RHCSA10-B /var/www/html/server-b.html && grep -Eq '"'"'^Listen[[:space:]]+8201$'"'"' /etc/httpd/conf.d/exam-b-port.conf && semanage port -l | awk '"'"'$1 == "http_port_t" && $2 == "tcp" && $0 ~ /(^|[ ,])8201([, ]|$)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' && firewall-cmd --permanent --query-port=8201/tcp && firewall-cmd --query-port=8201/tcp && systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; getent group serverb10 >/dev/null && id -nG srvb10 | tr '"'"' '"'"' '"'"'\n'"'"' | grep -qx serverb10'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq '"'"'^%serverb10[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$'"'"' /etc/sudoers.d/serverb10-systemctl && visudo -cf /etc/sudoers.d/serverb10-systemctl >/dev/null'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; files=""; test -d /var/log/journal && systemctl is-active systemd-journald | grep -qx active && files=$(find /etc/systemd -maxdepth 2 \( -path /etc/systemd/journald.conf -o -path '"'"'/etc/systemd/journald.conf.d/*.conf'"'"' \) -type f 2>/dev/null); test -n "$files" && awk '"'"'FNR == 1 {in_journal=0} /^[[:space:]]*\[Journal\][[:space:]]*($|#)/ {in_journal=1; next} /^[[:space:]]*\[/ {in_journal=0} in_journal && /^[[:space:]]*Storage[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*persistent[[:space:]]*($|#)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' $files'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq '"'"'^local5\.\*[[:space:]]+/var/log/server-b-local5\.log$'"'"' /etc/rsyslog.d/server-b-local5.conf && systemctl is-active rsyslog | grep -qx active && grep -Fq '"'"'server-b-local5'"'"' /var/log/server-b-local5.log'

findmnt -no SOURCE,TARGET /mnt/bprojects | grep -qx 'server:/exports/exam-b /mnt/bprojects' && grep -Eq '^server:/exports/exam-b[[:space:]]+/mnt/bprojects[[:space:]]+nfs([[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq "^/exports/exam-b[[:space:]]+192\\.168\\.122\\.0/24" /etc/exports.d/exam-b-integrated.exports && systemctl is-active nfs-server | grep -qx active'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl get-default | grep -qx multi-user.target'
rpm -q lsof >/dev/null && ! rpm -q tcpdump >/dev/null 2>&1
solution_outline: Work through each question independently and verify before moving on.
task_titles: Install the tree package from the configured offline repositories
Create /srv/teamb10 as a shared directory for group teamb10
Create user auditorb10 with UID 6102 and shell /sbin/nologin
Create VG vgb10 and LV datab mounted at /mnt/datab10
Set the default boot target to multi-user.target without rebooting
Install lsof and ensure tcpdump is removed
solution_commands: nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.61/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF

cat > /etc/systemd/system/serverbtimer.service <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Server B timer job

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/sbin/serverbtimer.sh
EOF

cat > /etc/systemd/system/serverbtimer.timer <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Run server B timer job

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*:0/10
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
EOF
semanage port -a -t http_port_t -p tcp 8201 2>/dev/null || semanage port -m -t http_port_t -p tcp 8201

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF
